articles.title: Bride-to-be, stabbed 34 times, chilling CCTV: How Mohali office turned into scene of horror
articles.summary: A shocking incident in Mohali saw a 30-year-old woman, Dimple, brutally stabbed to death by a colleague just days before her wedding. The attack, captured on CCTV, occurred at her office desk.

articles.title: GDP rose 7.7% in FY26, 7.8% in Q4; RBI trims this year's projection to 6.6%
articles.summary: India's economy surged by 7.8% in the Jan-March quarter, driven by strong investment, consistent farm output, and expansion in construction and tertiary sectors. This robust demand offset potential negative impacts from West Asian conflicts.

articles.title: Karnataka Police Constable Recruitment 2026: Applications open for 3,395 posts; check eligibility, selection process and how to apply
articles.summary: Karnataka Police has announced recruitment for 3,395 Constable (Civil) positions, with applications opening June 5, 2026. Eligibility requires PUC/Class 12, with age limits varying by category.

articles.title: TS Inter Supplementary Results 2026 expected soon: Check likely dates, how to download
articles.summary: Telangana Intermediate supplementary exam results for 1st and 2nd year students are expected between June 10-16, 2026. Following the completion of evaluations, the TGBIE will soon release scores for both general and vocational streams.

articles.title: UP Police SI Admit Card 2026 released at uppbpb.gov.in: Check link and steps to download
articles.summary: Uttar Pradesh Police Sub-Inspector candidates can now download their admit cards for Document Verification and Physical Standard Test. Successful candidates from the March 2026 written exam can access their hall tickets on the UPPRPB website.

articles.title: Big relief for JEE aspirants: IIT Roorkee opens counselling route for candidates below 75% marks in CBSE Class 12
articles.summary: IIT Roorkee has said that students who do not meet the minimum Class 12 marks criteria can still participate in the ongoing JEE Advanced counselling process. However, final admission will depend on meeting the required marks and document verification.
